name: Study MultiQC
description: Aggregate prior study QC outputs into a single MultiQC report

inputs.name: Prior QC outputs
inputs.description: QC output directories produced by earlier runs in the study (FastQC zips, seqkit TSVs, read-cleaning multiqc_data)
inputs.sourceDescription: Gathered output directories of prior QC runs in the same study

outputs.name: MultiQC report
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as a study-level report and previewable in-app

outputs.name: MultiQC data
outputs.description: Parsed MultiQC data tables and metadata
outputs.destinationDescription: Stored as run artifacts for download

steps.name: MultiQC
steps.description: Run MultiQC over the gathered QC output directory of the study

parameters.name: reportTitle
parameters.description: Title shown at the top of the MultiQC report
